_comment: Swap-ability manifest for journey/index.html and the two video teasers on index.html + craft/index.html. To replace any placeholder clip with new real footage: drop the new file in rug-videos/journey/ (compressed, ~1080p max, no audio — see the ffmpeg recipe in feedback_tiziri_video_strategy.md), generate a poster frame with the same basename + '-poster.jpg', update the 'file' value below, then update the matching src/data-src + poster attributes in the HTML. Clips tagged reserve are compressed and ready but not currently placed on any page.

beats.beat: The Harvest — hand-shearing, fleece lifted off
beats.status: SWAPPED 2026-07-10 — replaced stock wool-texture clip with real hand-shearing footage (trimmed 9.5-18.5s of the source). Eyebrow changed The Wool -> The Harvest to match.

beats.beat: Natural Dyeing — now TEXT ONLY, no video
beats.status: REMOVED 2026-07-08 — user confirmed this is dyed straw/reed fiber, not wool. Searched Pexels extensively (7 queries), no clean free wool-in-a-dye-pot clip exists; good matches were paid iStock only. Beat is now text-only (.journey-text-beat) until real footage exists — do not restore this file without a genuine wool clip.
